title: stelis barkleyi
intro: Stelis barkleyi, also known as the Barkley's Stelis, is a species of orchid native to Costa Rica. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to inhibit the growth of certain microorganisms and exhibit antioxidant activity. The health benefits of Stelis barkleyi include its potential to reduce inflammation and improve cardiovascular health, although further research is needed to confirm these findings. Herbal preparations of the plant are typically made by infusing the roots and leaves in water, and have been traditionally used in folk medicine to treat various ailments.
